weekly picks (Jun 3 week 2026)

Posted on June 15, 2026 in 2026jun,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 June 3rd week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

06/18

  1. s41467-026-74665-x Strong yet highly conductive liquid metal composite film constructed via friction induced in-situ synthesis (Nature Communications)

  2. s42005-026-02526-6 Quantum superposition of black hole states as a communication resource (Communications Physics)

  3. s41586-026-10676-4 A 98-qubit trapped-ion quantum computer with all-to-all connectivity (Nature)

  4. d41586-026-01702-6 Reconfigurable quantum computer juggles 98 qubits (Nature)
